findings.issue: T14 references the register CLI test at `scripts/__tests__/register.test.ts` (lines 73 and 123), but T11 — round-1-approved — explicitly relocates the register CLI test to `packages/middleware/src/__tests__/register-cli.test.ts` and forbids a `scripts/` vitest config (T11 lines 71-84, 105-110, 138, 177). The Test Audit will look for a file that does not exist by design and either flag a false missing-test finding or fail to map the actual tests.
findings.fix: Update T14: change both occurrences of `scripts/__tests__/register.test.ts` to `packages/middleware/src/__tests__/register-cli.test.ts` to match T11's relocation; update the mandatory items list (line 177) `Register CLI scrub test` evidence path accordingly.

findings.issue: T13 frontmatter declares `verify: []` but the Verification Steps section contains a populated `### Smoke` subsection (lines 138-140 — asserting the audit report file is present and the sign-off section states critical/high counts). If those checks are intended as smoke verification, frontmatter should be `verify: [smoke]`; otherwise the Smoke subsection should be removed.
findings.fix: Either set frontmatter `verify: [smoke]` to match the populated Smoke subsection, or move the two existing smoke bullets up into Automated/Acceptance Criteria and remove `### Smoke`.

findings.issue: AC line 58 lists the compliance matrix coverage as `D1, D3, D4, D5, D6, D7, D8, D10–D18` — D2 is missing. D2 (EIP-3009 `transferWithAuthorization` with explicit `from`) does constrain middleware code (`settle.ts`) and is part of the audit surface mentioned in the cross-cutting checks (`grep` for `selfdestruct/delegatecall`, etc.). Excluding D2 from the matrix risks the code-audit silently dropping a Decision that has direct code implications.
findings.fix: Update AC line 58 to read `D1, D2, D3, D4, D5, D6, D7, D8, D10–D18` (or be explicit that D2 is delegated to T13 for security-only coverage and not part of T12's quality matrix).
